name: bold_forward_gothic_no_referent

meta.note: [provenance:reference-impl-aligned §6.12 + ADR-0027] ゴシック体 is a first-class gothic construct, distinct from 太字 (the corpus uses them in disjoint works; gothic is a typeface family, not a bold weight). A no-referent ゴシック体 is a self-contained gothic run; serialize preserves the ゴシック体 spelling byte-exact (§7.6) — it is NOT folded to 太字. Bytes from the reference parser.

source: 本文［＃「強調」はゴシック体］。

expected.serialize: 本文［＃「強調」はゴシック体］。
